message.content:
@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle
skinparam actorStyle circle
skinparam interfaceStyle circle

package "Upstream" {
    actor Producer
    actor Adapter
    interface Tansport
}

package "Gateway" {
    interface JobExecution
    actor GatewayJobHandler
    interface Tansport
    actor Adapter
    actor Consumer
    actor Gateway
    actor Producer
    actor Adapter
}

package "Downstream" {
    interface Tansport
    actor Adapter
    actor Consumer
    actor DownstreamJobHandler
    interface JobExecution
    interface Tansport
}

package "Lower Layer" {
    actor Lower Layer
    interface Tansport
}

Producer --> Adapter : publish(command)
Producer --> Tansport : getDelay(command)
Tansport --> Producer : execute(command)
Tansport --> Adapter : publish(command)
